query: SELECT ts.id, ts.ticket_number, ts.customer_name, ts.customer_email, ts.reservation_id, ts.created_at FROM tpv_sales ts WHERE ts.ticket_number = 'TPV-20260325-2402' OR ts.customer_name LIKE '%Faustino%' OR ts.customer_email LIKE '%faustino%' ORDER BY ts.created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
